name: Tania Maria
abstract: Tania Maria (born May 9, 1948) is a Brazilian artist, singer, composer, bandleader and piano player, singing mostly in Portuguese or English. Her Brazilian-style music is mostly vocal, sometimes pop, often jazzy, and includes samba, bossa, Afro-Latin, pop and jazz fusion.

concerts.label: Tania Maria, Singer, with Michel Camilo, Piano

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Lateano
about_quotes.evidence: we show up at the Coast Recorders and Tania is there and we meet her... we just worked it out and recorded it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Lateano interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Don Alias
about_quotes.evidence: Mitch Stein on guitar, who was a friend of mine who I’d met playing with Tania Maria
about_quotes.doc_title: Don Alias interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002
